plan_metadata.name: Feature DA From Office Option For MetaOS AddIn

steps.description: Click the "Office Add-in" option in the "New Project" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Create Declarative Agent with Office Add-in Action" option in the capability selection dropdown within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "New Declarative Agent with Office Add-in Actions" option in the capability selection dropdown within the "Declarative Agent in MetaOS Capabilities" window of Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Default folder" option (/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects) in the workspace folder selection dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "appPackage" folder in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code to expand or select it.
